title: Celestia SMP Season 0
description: Season 0 pack for the Celestia SMP, now available to anyone.
body:
This is a modpack made for season 0 of the Celestia SMP.

[Celestia SMP](https://forms.gle/TkYDgjE8Dm87xWRX9) is run by two idiot who have no idea how to properly make modpacks and therefore this pack may or may not be optimized or balanced very well.

### WARNING
this pack has been abandoned to focus on preparing the Season 1 pack

Features:
- Origins
- More structures
- builtin shaders
- Create (with addons)
- Painting
- Tech mods
- Voxelmap
- Soulslike weaponry & bosses
- New world generation
- Overhauled enchanting
- Much more
